summary: Mapped the first usable ASMS home-shell config seam. PHP login bootstrap requires a Metro config fetch before home.php, using RestClient against http://127.0.0.1:8080/afa. Apache externally exposes the equivalent backend as /afa/api/v1/config, while /afa/config is not externally mapped and returned 404 in observed logs. Same-minute supporting traffic included external/noauth config probes and session-extension checks, but those did not appear to be the blocking dependency for home.php.
follow_up_recommendations: If you need to validate this seam actively, probe /afa/api/v1/config from the external side rather than /afa/config.

Correlate one successful SuiteLoginSessionValidation-to-home.php flow with Metro localhost_access_log.txt request IDs or session IDs to distinguish suite-frame config reads from direct AFA home-shell reads even more tightly.
